variants: Mykaela Persaud currently resides in Elderberry Crossing, having been born in Brambleseed Cove. Her expertise in technology is highlighted by her creation of the Kindle Core Analyzer, a device that has gained recognition in the field. For her achievements in writing, she has received the Wandering Scribe Recognition award. In addition to her professional pursuits, Mykaela is a dedicated member of the Frostroot Apiculturists, where she engages with others who share her passion for beekeeping.
